sql_array: CREATE TABLE geometry_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY, other_data VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO geometry_data (id, geom) VALUES (2, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(NULL, NULL), 256, 257, 0, 1)));
SELECT id, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(12.34, 56.78), 256, 257, 0, 1)) AS geom_box FROM geometry_data WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM geometry_data);
CREATE TABLE user_types (id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_defined NEW user_type);
INSERT INTO user_types (id, user_defined) VALUES (1, NEW user_type());
SELECT id, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(COALESCE(NULL, 0), 0), 256, 257, 0, 1)) AS geom_box FROM geometry_data GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(geom) > 1;
SELECT geom FROM geometry_data JOIN user_types ON geometry_data.id = user_types.id WHERE user_types.user_defined IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO geometry_data (id, geom) VALUES (3, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(0, 0), -1, 1001, 0, 1)));
SELECT id, SUM(DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(lng, lat), 256, 257, 0, 1))) OVER (PARTITION BY id) FROM geometry_data;
ALTER TABLE geometry_data ADD COLUMN new_column VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'default_value';
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_geom_data AS SELECT DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(10.00, 20.00), 256, 257, 0, 1)) AS geom FROM geometry_data;
WITH geom_cte AS (SELECT id, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(1.1, 2.2), -1, 257, 0, 1)) FROM geometry_data) SELECT * FROM geom_cte WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM geometry_data WHERE id < 10);
INSERT INTO geometry_data (id, geom) VALUES (4, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(12.0, 45.0), 256, NULL, 0, 1)));
SELECT id, DB.DBA.rdf_geo_add(rdf_box(st_point(2E+5, 4E-1), 256, 257, 0, 1)) AS geom_box FROM geometry_data WHERE geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY geom_box;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (id INT, value VARCHAR(10) CHECK (length(value) > 0));
INSERT INTO edge_cases (id, value) VALUES (2, NULL);
